photo-to-anime.title: [Free] Photo to Anime AI - 1-Click Anime Avatar
photo-to-anime.description: Turn your selfie into anime art in seconds with a free 1-click photo to anime AI. Try Ghibli, webtoon, cyberpunk, and retro styles from one upload.
photo-to-anime.h1: Free Photo to Anime AI Converter
photo-to-anime.subtitle: Turn any photo into anime art in seconds. Pick a style, adjust intensity, and generate your new anime look.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign up?
faqs.answer: To generate images you'll need an account. New accounts get a small free allowance to try it.

faqs.question: Will it look like me?
faqs.answer: Our anime styles aim to preserve key facial features while transforming the overall look into a clean 2D anime aesthetic.

ghibli-filter.title: [Free] Ghibli Filter AI - Turn Photos into Anime Art
ghibli-filter.description: Upload a selfie and create a warm, storybook Ghibli-inspired portrait in one click. Get soft colors, hand-drawn mood, and a magical anime look fast.
ghibli-filter.subtitle: Turn any photo into a warm, hand-drawn Ghibli-inspired masterpiece in seconds.

faqs.question: Is this a real Studio Ghibli product?
faqs.answer: No. This is a fan-inspired AI style filter and is not affiliated with Studio Ghibli.

faqs.question: What photos work best?
faqs.answer: Clear portraits and well-lit outdoor photos usually produce the best results.

anime-pfp-generator.title: [Free] Anime PFP Generator - Make a Custom Avatar
anime-pfp-generator.description: Turn your selfie into a custom anime profile picture for Discord, Twitch, and social media. Fast, simple, and built for standout avatars.
anime-pfp-generator.subtitle: Level up your profile with a custom anime avatar-made from your real photo.

faqs.question: Can I use it for Discord and Twitch?
faqs.answer: Yes. The generated images are perfect for profile pictures on social platforms.

faqs.question: Can I generate multiple variants?
faqs.answer: Yes-try different styles and intensity levels to get your favorite look.

90s-anime-filter.title: [Free] 90s Anime Filter - Make Retro Anime Portraits
90s-anime-filter.description: Give your photo a nostalgic 90s anime glow with retro cel shading, softer colors, and classic animation vibes in one quick upload.
90s-anime-filter.subtitle: A nostalgic cel-shaded anime look inspired by classic 90s animation.

faqs.question: What is a 90s anime style?
faqs.answer: Think clean outlines, cel shading, and slightly softer color palettes typical of 90s animation.

cyberpunk-anime.title: [Free] Cyberpunk Anime Filter - Make Neon Anime Art
cyberpunk-anime.description: Transform your selfie into a neon cyberpunk anime portrait with bold lights, futuristic mood, and high-impact sci-fi style in seconds.
cyberpunk-anime.subtitle: Neon lights, futuristic mood, and bold anime lines-generated from your photo.

faqs.question: Does it add neon backgrounds?
faqs.answer: Yes, the cyberpunk style tends to add futuristic lighting and mood. You can also add optional notes in the prompt.

webtoon-ai.title: [Free] Webtoon AI Filter - Turn Photos into Webtoon Art
webtoon-ai.description: Upload your photo and create a crisp webtoon-style portrait with clean lines, polished comic shading, and a modern character look.
webtoon-ai.subtitle: A crisp, modern comic look-simple shapes, clean lines, and readable shading.

faqs.question: Is webtoon style different from anime?
faqs.answer: Yes-webtoon styles often favor cleaner shapes and flatter, readable shading compared to traditional anime rendering.

cosplay-enhancer.title: [Free] Cosplay Enhancer AI - Turn Cosplay into Anime
cosplay-enhancer.description: Upload a cosplay photo and turn it into polished anime artwork while keeping the spirit of your costume, character, and key visual details.
cosplay-enhancer.subtitle: Convert cosplay shots into anime art-great for sharing and profile pics.

faqs.question: Will it keep my costume details?
faqs.answer: It tries to preserve key shapes and colors. For best results, use high-quality, well-lit photos.
